articles.title: California sheriff running for governor seizes more than a half million ballots from 2025 election
articles.content: County elections officials have disputed the claims by Riverside County Sheriff Chad Bianco, a Republican. The measure passed in the county by a margin of more than 80,000 votes. Bianco seized ballots in Riverside County, the inland California county of 2.5 million people where he has...
